doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document contradicts established EDPB/CJEU positions on pseudonymized data and no such Guidance Note 04/2026 is known to exist.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: This document contradicts established EDPB/CJEU positions (e.g., Breyer, IAB Europe) treating pseudonymized data as personal data even for non-key-holders when re-identification is reasonably possible, and no such Guidance Note 04/2026 is known to exist.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document contradicts established EDPB/CJEU positions on pseudonymized data and no such Guidance Note 04/2026 is known to exist.
